holdings.infoBox: TRFM is an equity ETF with a total of 262 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 1.63%, Marvell Technology at 1.48%, Micron Technology at 1.42%, Advanced Micro Devices at 1.40%, and Dell Technologies at 1.31%.

overview.description: The AAM Transformers ETF (TRFM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pence Transformers index. The fund tracks a modified equal-weighted index of US-listed companies that have the potential to transform consumer behavior and technological innovation. Companies are screened for their spending on research and development (R&D). TRFM was launched on Jul 11, 2022 and is issued by Advisors Asset Management.
